structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-02-28: NewRez and PennyMac added to Polly
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-02-28 14:12:00-07:00



NewRez and PennyMac added to Polly

 

Effective March 3rd, NewRez and PennyMac’s products will be added back to NOVA’s Policy A program listing.  This change will give NOVA’s LOs the opportunity to capitalize on the aggregators setting an aggressive price when they have an appetite for loans.  Polly will provide the additional investors’ eligible products in the same search result screen as the NOVA programs.  These will not be Best Effort locks and will be available using standard lock periods (30 day, 45 day, etc...).  For eligible loans locked using Pennymac or NewRez pricing, NOVA’s Policy A Lock Policy will apply, including extensions, float downs, and relocks.  This will provide the best priced options while allowing standardized lock policies.  An updated version of the Lock Policy has been attached and is available on NOVANet.    

 

In order to take advantage of these investors’ pricing, the loan will be subject to the guidelines of the investor used to price and lock the rate.  PennyMac and NewRez overlay matrices have been added to NOVANet here <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/Product%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?FolderCTID=0x012000DB97B9DE7A6AA64F85449F51AA6BE673&id=%2Fsites%2FHome%2FProduct%20Documents%2FNOVA%20Products%20%26%20Underwriting%20%2D%202025%2FResources&viewid=854eb2c2%2D1783%2D4dc0%2D87eb%2D564dae106b49> .  It is important to review guidelines prior to committing to the borrower a rate/price sourced from these investor options.  

 

If a locked loan is determined to be ineligible for an investor’s product, the lock will be repriced using original day pricing from the NOVA ratesheet.  Additionally, the exception fee for NOVA to retain servicing will be eliminated.  Moving forward, if a request is received to restrict a loan to retained servicing, the lock will be priced using NOVA’s ratesheet, with no exception fee.  NOVA’s loan sale process will not change.  Any Policy A loan that does not have a delivery restriction request will be offered for sale to all eligible investor partners.

 

Announcement Details:

Date:

02/28/2025

NCM 02.28.2025

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
